name: Tego Cyber Inc.
summary: Tego Cyber Inc., an early-stage company, engages in the development and commercialization of cybersecurity services and solutions that reduce risk, prevent cyber-attacks, and protect intellectual property and data. It provides cyberthreat intelligence, which includes a suite of related cyber security services, including vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, vCISO services, dark web monitoring, and cybersecurity policy creation and review, as well as ongoing enterprise employee training for larger business enterprises. The company is also developing a threat intelligence platform, which will work cohesively to improve the operational efficiency of an enterprise's existing cyber security infrastructure. Tego Cyber Inc. was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada.
